narrative: Czwarty dzień śledzenia — equity $96,643 (-3.87% / -$3,900 od startu). Krytyczny incydent zamknięty dziś: exit-emergency 4/4 bez wykonania (LIMIT w szybkim rynku = zero ochrony przez kilka godzin); patch na direct REST MARKET ląduje w tej sesji, exit-emergency-GOOGL 1/1 filled potwierdza że poprawka technicznie działa. options-momentum 40% fill rate (4/10, 3 canceled) = systematycznie tracimy ~60% zamierzonej ekspozycji CALL przez limity poniżej ask. Reżim trending_up — options_side_bias=long poprawny; natychmiastowy priorytet to szersze limity opcyjne, nie zmiana strony.
edge_assessment: Zero zamkniętych round-tripów po 4 dniach (wszystkie geo/options pozycje wciąż otwarte) — nie można ocenić edge per-strategy ilościowo. Jedyna potwierdzona jakość wykonania: geo-entry XOM/XLE/RTX 3/3 filled; geo-GLD 0/1 (canceled) sugeruje zbyt ciasny limit na ETF surowcowym w szybkim rally.

new_heuristic_proposals.title: Detect options-momentum fill rate below 50% over 5+ orders and alert to widen limits
new_heuristic_proposals.rationale: options-momentum 40% fill rate (4/10, 3 canceled) — systematically losing ~60% of intended CALL exposure because limit prices sit below the ask. This function detects the pattern and surfaces an actionable warning in rationale.md so the operator widens bid tolerance in options-monitor.
new_heuristic_proposals.wire_into_adapt_strategy: after fill-rate section, before win-rate thresholds: call heuristic_options_limit_too_tight(fill_stats); if True, log warning with reason so operator sees it in rationale.md

new_heuristic_proposals.title: Widen options-monitor limit prices to ask+1% to fix 40% fill rate
new_heuristic_proposals.rationale: options-momentum fill rate 40% (4/10, 3 canceled) = limits sit below market ask. Options spreads are 3-8% on retail size; buying at bid/mid guarantees non-fills in any directional move. Fix lives in options-monitor.py, not adapter.
new_heuristic_proposals.implementation_sketch: In options-monitor/monitor.py::auto_execute_options(): (1) Fetch live quote via Alpaca /v2/options/contracts/{symbol}/quotes to get real-time ask_price. (2) Set limit_price = round(ask_price * 1.01, 2). (3) On quote-fetch failure fall back to close_price * 1.05. (4) After 5 days check fill_rate in daily-learning — if still < 60%, escalate to market-at-open (verify Alpaca paper supports MOO on options first).

new_heuristic_proposals.title: Emergency exit patch production verification — confirm MARKET orders fill in next session
new_heuristic_proposals.rationale: exit-emergency 4/4 unfilled (LIMIT in fast market = no protection). Patch applied this session sends MARKET orders via direct REST. Must verify in the next trading session that new exit-emergency-* client_order_ids appear in fill_rate with fill_rate=1.0. This is the highest-risk unverified fix in the system.
new_heuristic_proposals.implementation_sketch: In next daily-learning run: check fill_stats for any exit-emergency-* keys created after 2026-05-09T15:00Z. If fill_rate < 1.0, MARKET patch is broken in production — revert and debug. Also add post-order status poll in exit-monitor: after placing MARKET order, call /v2/orders/{id} after 30s; if not filled, raise alert email with order details and position size.
